tables.name: pdb_entries
tables.schema_sql: pdb_id STRING, title STRING, method STRING, method_full STRING, resolution FLOAT, r_work FLOAT, r_free FLOAT, organism STRING, deposition_date STRING, release_date STRING, citation_doi STRING

tables.name: pdb_uniprot_mapping
tables.schema_sql: pdb_id STRING, chain_id STRING, uniprot_accession STRING, res_beg INT, res_end INT, pdb_beg STRING, pdb_end STRING, sp_beg INT, sp_end INT

tables.name: pdb_validation
tables.schema_sql: pdb_id STRING, clashscore FLOAT, percent_ramachandran_outliers FLOAT, percent_rotamer_outliers FLOAT, angles_rmsz FLOAT, bonds_rmsz FLOAT
